summary: Iteration 2 testing: All 15 features validated. Backend 9/9 tests passed. Frontend all pages/components working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test category created and deleted via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: Dashboard shows 6 KPI progress bars (Objectifs du mois), Sidebar has 4 nav items, CategoriesPage CRUD works (add/delete/recalculate), SettingsPage shows club name + 6 target fields + recalculate-all button. All backend APIs (/api/settings GET/PUT, /api/categories CRUD, /api/monthly-kpis/recalculate-all, /api/monthly-kpis/{month}/recalculate) fully functional.
